name: SwCh TOSCA Codespace
postCreateCommand: set -e; curl -fsSL "https://dl.k8s.io/release/$(curl -fsSL https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" -o /tmp/kubectl && sudo install -o root -g root -m 0755 /tmp/kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl && rm -f /tmp/kubectl && curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv sync && wget https://github.com/Swarmchestrate/tosca/releases/download/v0.2.4/go-puccini_0.22.7-SNAPSHOT-3e85b40_linux_amd64.deb && (sudo dpkg -i go-puccini_0.22.7-SNAPSHOT-3e85b40_linux_amd64.deb || sudo apt --fix-broken install -y) && rm -f go-puccini_0.22.7-SNAPSHOT-3e85b40_linux_amd64.deb
